vfkb.text: next: Implement src/config.ts to read environment variables into a typed config object at startup. Then create the service entry point (src/index.ts) that initializes config and logger, and wire up the main tracking logic.

Next session: implement config loader that reads env vars at startup and integrate logger into the service. Logger is ready at src/log.ts. Config should follow 12-factor (env vars only, no hot reload). Watch for the serialization gotcha when logging Errors.

Next: Implement error wrapper utilities (convert Error → {name, message, stack}) and add unit tests for src/log.ts, particularly testing Error serialization edge case and circular reference handling per the gotcha entry.
